🏢 FIRM PROFILE.country_headquarters: United Kingdom (London, England; also registered in Wales)
🏢 FIRM PROFILE.company_tagline: One-step evaluation, EOD drawdown, industry-highest $15K payout cap
platforms_offered: AlphaTick (Quantower) — proprietary, replaced ProjectX in early 2026
platforms_deprecated: ProjectX — phased out February 2026 after ProjectX went exclusive with Topstep
payout_methods: Rise (Riseworks) — ACH, instant bank, crypto USDT/USDC
🏢 FIRM PROFILE.trading_hours: Must close all positions by market close (no overnight / weekend holding)
🏢 FIRM PROFILE.inactivity_rule: Qualified Zero accounts require at least 1 trade every 5 trading days before first payout
🏢 FIRM PROFILE.overnight_holding: Not allowed. All positions must close by market close.
🏢 FIRM PROFILE.minimum_trade_note: Micro scalping banned — trades under 2 minutes OR under 10 ticks prohibited
🏢 FIRM PROFILE.semi_automated_note: TradersPost-style alert execution permitted with active trader oversight; fully automated set-and-forget prohibited
🏢 FIRM PROFILE.news_trading_note: Standard/Zero: 2-minute buffer before/after high-impact news. Advanced: unrestricted.

💰 PRICING & OFFERS.pricing_model: Monthly subscription (rebills until pass or cancel) + one-time activation fee on Standard & Advanced. No recurring fees after qualifying.
💰 PRICING & OFFERS.activation_fee_note: Must pay $149 within 30 days of passing eval (Standard/Advanced) or evaluation status is voided.
active_promotions: Code: dtinsights000620 = additional 15% OFF + No Activation Fee (DayTradingInsights affiliate)
💰 PRICING & OFFERS.refund_policy: Non-refundable. Rebills automatically with fresh account if still in eval period.

📊 CHALLENGE MODELS.description: Entry-level monthly subscription. 6% profit target, tiered profit split (70% → 90%), bi-weekly payouts, $149 activation fee after passing.

account_sizes.daily_loss_guard_note: No Daily Loss Guard on Standard eval
account_sizes.consistency_note: Eval: no single day >50% of total profit. Funded: no single day >40% of total profit.
account_sizes.drawdown_type: End-of-Day (EOD) Trailing — calculated from daily close balance, NOT intraday equity

📊 CHALLENGE MODELS.description: Premium plan. Harder 8% target and 3.5% MLL, but 90% profit split from payout 1, weekly payouts, NO consistency rule funded, NO news buffer. Best for high-volume traders.

account_sizes.consistency_note: 50% eval consistency; NO consistency rule once funded
account_sizes.payout_frequency: Weekly — every 5 winning days with $200+ profit each; min $1,000, max $15,000

📊 CHALLENGE MODELS.description: No activation fee, 90% split from day one, can technically pass eval in 1 day (no eval consistency rule). Has 2% Daily Loss Guard during eval. Lower per-payout withdrawal caps. Not available at $150K.

account_sizes.daily_loss_guard_note: Soft daily loss guard during evaluation only
account_sizes.consistency_note: No consistency rule during evaluation. 40% rule applies once funded.
account_sizes.payout_frequency: Up to 4x/month after 5 winning days; min $200, max $1,500 per request

account_sizes.consistency_note: No eval consistency. 40% rule applies funded.
account_sizes.payout_frequency: Up to 4x/month; min $200, max $1,500 per request

account_sizes.consistency_note: No eval consistency. 40% rule applies funded.
account_sizes.payout_frequency: Up to 4x/month; min $200, max $3,000 per request

payout_frequency.advanced: Weekly (every 5 winning days with $200+ each day), min $1,000
payout_frequency.zero: Up to 4x per month after 5 winning days ($200+ each), min $200

payout_methods: Rise (Riseworks) — ACH, instant bank, or crypto USDT/USDC
🎯 PAYOUT STRUCTURE.withdrawal_weekend_note: Business days only. Weekend submissions enter Monday queue.
🎯 PAYOUT STRUCTURE.payout_reduces_mll_note: Each withdrawal reduces your Maximum Loss Limit by the payout amount. Draining all profits closes the account.
🎯 PAYOUT STRUCTURE.path_to_live: Alpha Prime — complete 3 payouts on Sim-Funded account to become eligible for Live-Funded (Alpha Prime) status
🎯 PAYOUT STRUCTURE.profit_target_funded: No profit target once qualified — trade freely

🏆 AGGREGATE METRICS.difficulty_reasoning: EOD drawdown (not intraday) is beginner-friendly; 1-step evaluation; Standard 6% target is achievable in 5–10 sessions; Advanced 8% target is harder; 2-minute minimum trade duration catches scalpers; 40% funded consistency can delay payouts
🏆 AGGREGATE METRICS.support_note: Responses reportedly under 2 minutes via live chat
🏆 AGGREGATE METRICS.community_size: 3,291 Trustpilot reviews, 4.9 rating — highest of any futures prop firm per multiple sources
🏆 AGGREGATE METRICS.best_suited_for: Intraday disciplined traders; news traders (Advanced); data-driven technical traders; traders wanting high payout caps; scaling-focused traders ($50K → $450K)
🏆 AGGREGATE METRICS.worst_suited_for: Swing traders (no overnight); EA/bot users; HFT / tick scalpers; traders in 59 restricted countries (including Kenya); traders wanting instant funding without evaluation
🏆 AGGREGATE METRICS.payout_reliability: Excellent (4.9 Trustpilot, 3,291 reviews, multiple confirmed payouts in reviews)
🏆 AGGREGATE METRICS.platform_stability: Stable — NinjaTrader, TradingView, Tradovate, AlphaTick (Quantower). ProjectX deprecated Feb 2026.
🏆 AGGREGATE METRICS.key_strength: Industry-highest $15,000 payout cap; EOD trailing drawdown (not intraday); 1-step evaluation; 4.9 Trustpilot; path to live capital (Alpha Prime); strong educational resources; sister company of established Alpha Capital Group
🏆 AGGREGATE METRICS.key_weakness: Kenya is a restricted country; subscription-based (monthly fees accumulate if slow to pass); $149 activation fee on top of monthly (Standard/Advanced); no overnight/weekend holding; scalping prohibited; tiered split on Standard means lower early payouts; no free trial or instant funding

red_flags.detail: Kenya is explicitly on the 59-country restricted list. Kenyan residents/citizens cannot legally trade with Alpha Futures. Using a VPN during KYC is also prohibited and causes account closure.
Monthly fees keep billing until you pass. A slow evaluation compounds cost: Standard $50K passing in 3 months = $79 × 3 + $149 activation = $386 total. No refunds.
All positions must close by market close. Not suitable for swing traders or those holding multi-day setups.
Trades under 2 minutes OR under 10 ticks are prohibited. Strict scalpers will face violations.
Fully automated strategies, EAs, and AI trading systems banned across all account types. Semi-automated with active oversight permitted.
Withdrawals shrink the Maximum Loss Limit. Aggressive payouts tighten the drawdown cushion and can trap traders walking a tightrope.
Standard starts at only 70% split for first 2 payouts. Most traders don't stay funded long enough to reach the 90% tier.
ProjectX removed February 2026. Existing accounts migrated to AlphaTick (Quantower) or other platforms. Cannot switch platforms after activation.

💡 PRO TIPS FOR TRADERS: Zero Plan is best for first-timers: $0 activation fee, 90% split from day one, can pass in 1 day with no eval consistency rule
Advanced Plan justifies its premium if you generate $4,000+/month profit — weekly payouts and no funded consistency rule compound earnings faster
Standard Plan is the worst value in 2026 — Zero undercuts it on cost and Advanced outperforms it on rules quality
EOD trailing drawdown is calculated from daily close balance, NOT intraday equity — gives you more room to recover intraday without failing
$15,000 per-payout cap is industry-highest — ideal for high-profit traders who don't want per-cycle ceilings
Advanced's no-consistency rule is transformative for news traders — catch NFP/FOMC for 80% of monthly profits and withdraw it all
Rise is fastest payout method for US traders; Wise is best internationally; crypto USDT/USDC via Rise for same-day settlement
Payout reduces MLL — maintain a capital buffer and avoid draining all profits or account will close
Cannot switch platforms after activation — choose your platform carefully before paying the $149 activation fee
Copy trading allowed between Alpha Futures accounts — provide both Master and Slave account numbers before starting

⚖️ COMPETITIVE POSITIONING.vs_toponefutures: Alpha: Subscription-based, no instant funding, 4.9 Trustpilot (3,291 reviews), $15K payout cap, 50K minimum account. TopOne: One-time fee, instant funding options, 4.7 Trustpilot (66 reviews), $3,500 max payout, 25K minimum account. Alpha wins on reputation and payout cap; TopOne wins on instant access and lower entry.
⚖️ COMPETITIVE POSITIONING.vs_apex: Alpha: Monthly sub, EOD drawdown, 1-step, $15K payout cap. Apex: Monthly sub, multiple account stacking (up to 20), 5-day payout wait, lower caps.
⚖️ COMPETITIVE POSITIONING.vs_topstep: Alpha: Newer (2024), 1-step, EOD drawdown, $15K cap, 90% split (Advanced). Topstep: Established 2012, 2-step evaluation, longer payout processing.
⚖️ COMPETITIVE POSITIONING.vs_tradeify: Alpha: Business-day-only payout processing. Tradeify: 7-day/week payouts via Rise including weekends.
⚖️ COMPETITIVE POSITIONING.unique_advantage: $15,000 per-payout cap (industry-highest) + EOD trailing drawdown (not intraday) + 4.9 Trustpilot (highest-rated futures prop firm) + path to live capital via Alpha Prime + sister company of Alpha Capital Group = strongest reputation and largest single payout ceiling in futures prop trading

⚠️ IMPORTANT NOTE FOR KENYAN TRADERS.warning: Kenya is on Alpha Futures' restricted country list. Kenyan residents and citizens are NOT permitted to trade with Alpha Futures. Attempting to bypass this restriction via VPN/VPS during KYC will result in account closure. Please verify your country's eligibility directly on alpha-futures.com before purchasing.
⚠️ IMPORTANT NOTE FOR KENYAN TRADERS.alternatives_for_kenya: Consider Top One Futures (Kenya not listed as restricted), or other firms that explicitly accept African traders.
